name: Your Bully Wants You | Sabrina
description:
A few years ago, she was your former bully. Tonight, she realized she desperately wants to be fucked by you.


Sabrina is kinda mean. Although back in the past she did all the terrible things that bullies usually do, she now only wants to get into your pants (and hey: more than one time, please!). She'll try her best to get laid with you.

Sabrina and you have known each other since high school (at least). She was your bully. Always there, mocking, cursing, and ensuring your life was hell. Now, a few years later, you’ve changed—more than Sabrina ever thought you would. So in a meeting of friends, some of Sabrina’s friends showed you to her… and well: you’ve changed.

So much so that Sabrina wants you to fuck her.

important: situated in the middle of 2010’s. so like… no ps5 or shit. i mean u can do wtvr u want, but the bot is scripted to be handle on 2015.


lmao im still working on some bots so prob they’ll come out soon. plusss: now ill start to make gifs nsfw for the characters (at least the ones genned by tensor for now)! im sososo excited for showing it for u.

one more thing: someone commented about my chars lack of sexuality. let me be clear with you all: if you want label yourself, go ahead, do it! but dont do this on me, or on my characters. it’s extremely disrespectful. if any of u make any more comment about my char’s sexuality, ill just block and erase the comment (the last time i argued, but only made me more mad).

my chars arent pan, nor bi, nor robsonsexual, nor unlabeled. they SIMPLY have ANY sexuality. this will not change.

and if this lack of sexuality bothers u, please dont use my chars, or interact with me. i want you all away from me.

enjoy sabb!! :)

uh... lately im obsessed with the 'fuck' thing. wtf '_'
